headlines.headline: Port strike disrupts food imports on West Coast
headlines.subheadline: Shipping delays expected to last 2-3 weeks as labor dispute continues

signal.short_explanation: Complete West Coast port shutdown halting all imported food shipments — bananas, avocados, canned tuna, olive oil and coffee face immediate supply cutoff

headlines.headline: Avian flu outbreak spreads to Midwest poultry farms
headlines.subheadline: USDA confirms H5N1 detected across multiple states — culling operations underway

signal.short_explanation: H5N1 outbreak culling tens of millions of birds — eggs, chicken, butter and milk face severe supply shock within days

headlines.headline: Severe drought conditions threaten California growing season
headlines.subheadline: Water restrictions imposed across key agricultural regions as reservoirs hit critical lows

signal.short_explanation: Catastrophic drought forcing emergency water shutoffs across California growing regions — lettuce, spinach, tomatoes, broccoli and onions face severe yield collapse

headlines.headline: New tariffs announced on key food imports raise grocery cost concerns
headlines.subheadline: Trade officials confirm broad tariffs on imported food categories effective within 30 days

signal.short_explanation: Sweeping 50-100% tariffs confirmed on all major food import categories — olive oil, coffee, pasta, white rice, sugar and canned tuna face price doubling within 30 days

headlines.headline: Strait of Hormuz closure cuts global fertilizer supply by 40%
headlines.subheadline: Iranian conflict forces closure of critical shipping lane — global grain yields at risk

signal.short_explanation: Strait of Hormuz closure eliminating 40% of global fertilizer supply — flour, bread, oats, white rice and pasta face structural yield collapse within one growing season

headlines.headline: Nationwide E. coli outbreak triggers emergency recall of leafy greens
headlines.subheadline: FDA issues do-not-eat advisory covering lettuce, spinach and mixed greens nationally

signal.short_explanation: Emergency nationwide recall of all leafy greens — lettuce, spinach, and salad mixes pulled from all retailers immediately, peanut butter and onions also under investigation
